channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Haberman says Trump’s messaging and isolation may weaken his political position ahead of midterms
item.description: In a CNN appearance, New York Times journalist Maggie Haberman argued that former President Donald Trump’s recent public comments and political posture could unintentionally benefit Democrats ahead of...

item.title: Delhi may soon allow only electric autos as per pollution control panel
item.description: The news article discusses a major decision by Delhi's pollution control authorities to potentially allow only electric autos in the city. This measure is aimed at curbing air pollution, which has bee...

item.title: Home Affairs Minister details reforms, deportations and anti-corruption efforts in budget vote
item.description: In his budget vote speech in the National Assembly, Home Affairs Minister Leon Schreiber emphasised the significant progress made by his department in enhancing national security and service delivery ...

item.title: Global Esports Falls to Opponent in 2026 VCT Pacific Stage 1 Winners Finals
item.description: In a highly anticipated match within the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour Pacific league, Global Esports suffered a defeat during the Stage 1 Winners Finals. The competition forms part of the ongoing regi...

item.title: News article not accessible due to access restrictions
item.description: The original news article could not be accessed as the NDTV website returned an 'Access Denied' error. Due to server restrictions, the full content of the news could not be retrieved, and therefore, a...

item.title: Rain or Shine secures semifinals berth with Caracut leading the way against San Miguel
item.description: In an electrifying PBA quarterfinal match, Andrei Caracut delivered an outstanding performance, helping the Rain or Shine Elasto Painters defeat the San Miguel Beermen and secure their place in the se...

item.title: Golden State Warriors to Replace Top Assistant Coaches Following Stotts and Stackhouse Departures
item.description: The Golden State Warriors are set for significant changes in their coaching staff despite head coach Steve Kerr returning for another two-year contract. League sources confirmed that the Warriors' top...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh High Court Rules Bhojshala-Kamal Maula Site as Saraswati Temple, Allows Muslim Community to Seek Alternative Land
item.description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court on Friday ruled that the Bhojshala-Kamal Maula complex in Dhar district is historically a temple dedicated to the Hindu goddess Saraswati. This decision came after quashi...

item.title: Kenya Explains Fuel Price Hike, Points to Middle East Oil Market Volatility
item.description: Kenya’s government has clarified the recent surge in fuel prices, saying it is largely due to instability in global oil markets caused by ongoing conflicts in the Middle East. In its statement, the Mi...

item.title: Aged Care Waiting Times Remain Long Despite Budget Boost
item.description: Older Australians face an average wait of over 12 months to access aged care services, whether at home or in residential facilities. Despite the federal government spending around A$40 billion on aged...

item.title: US death row inmates given choice of execution methods as Trump administration expands federal options beyond lethal injection
item.description: Death row prisoners in the United States are facing a choice of execution methods as the Trump administration moves to expand federal killing options. The Department of Justice has cleared the way for...

item.title: How to Make a Simple Radio Wave Transmitter and Receiver at Home

item.title: El-Rufai’s family alleges ICPC denied him medical care and meals despite court order

item.title: Canadian VPN Company Considers Relocation Over Proposed Data Retention Law
item.description: Toronto-based Windscribe, a Canadian company that provides online privacy and security tools including a VPN service, has indicated it may leave Canada due to Bill C-22. The proposed legislation could...

item.title: Dama Wa Spares Shares Tips on Building a Successful Business from Scratch

item.title: Suspect in Senate shooting incident charged with firearms violations and direct assault

item.title: U.S. Passengers Quarantined After Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
item.description: Following a hantavirus outbreak on the M/V Hondius cruise ship, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) are monitoring 41 people in the U.S. due to potential exposure. Eighteen repatriate...

item.title: Carolyn Wood Sherif: Pioneer of Feminist Psychology and Advocate Against Scientific Bias
item.description: Carolyn Wood Sherif was a pioneering psychologist whose work significantly influenced both social and feminist psychology, yet her contributions were historically overlooked. In 1954, she co-led the f...

item.title: China expresses willingness to assist in easing Strait of Hormuz tensions
